word: G148 - αἰσχρολογία - aischrología - ahee-skhrol-og-ee'-ah - Filthy communication

sections.paragraph:
- Original: αἰσχρολογία

- Transliteration: Aischrologia

- Phonetic: ahee-skhrol-og-ee'-ah

- Definition:

1. foul speaking, low and obscene speech

- Origin: from G150 and G3056

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From G150 and G3056; vile conversation: - filthy communication.
